title: Knowledge Base Index
description: Repo-wide generated index of every knowledge-base topic file. Produced by scripts/knowledge-base/generate-index.js. Per-field constraints (title, summary, status, tier, owner, canonical, component) are sourced from config/knowledge-base/frontmatter.config.json so the index and the frontmatter contract cannot drift.

generatedFrom.description: Repo-relative path to the generator script.

id.description: Stable, path-derived identifier in the form tier<n>/<repo-relative-path-without-extension>.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the topic markdown file.

canonical.description: Repo-relative path to the canonical topic file when this entry is a cross-tier stub. Null otherwise.
